title: Cobblemon Smartphone
description: A smartphone with cobblemon integration for quick and portable functions like team healing, open your pc and your ender chest.
body:
![smartphone-Banner](https://i.imgur.com/pdye4Dm.png)

![update-banner](https://i.imgur.com/ehfJw1h.jpeg)

# Cobblemon Smartphone
A Cobblemon addon that adds customizable smartphones to enhance your Pokémon training experience in Cobblemon!

## Features
The smartphone comes with an expanding list of features that can be fully customized and toggled in the configuration:

1. **Pokémon Healing** - Quick access to heal your Pokémon team.
2. **PC Access** - Open your Pokémon PC storage system on the go.
3. **Cloud Storage** - Access your Ender Chest anywhere.
4. **Pokedex Access** - Quick access to your pokedex interface.
5. **Pokedex Scanner** - Use the dedicated hotkey (default `C`) to quick-scan Pokémon.
6. **16 Colors** - Smartphones are available in all 16 Minecraft dye colors!
7. **Smithing Upgrades** - You can now upgrade your smartphone using a Smithing Table!
   - **Cobblemon Pokenav (Addon)** - Combine your smartphone with a Pokenav (from the Cobblemon Pokenav mod) to access it directly from your smartphone interface.
   - **Waystones (Addon)** - Combine your smartphone with a Warp Stone (from the Waystones mod) to access the Waystones teleport network on the go.
8. **CobbleDollars (Addon)** - Quick access to the CobbleDollars shop interface (requires the CobbleDollars mod).
9. **Retro Textures** - Includes a built-in "Old Smartphone Textures" resource pack for a retro phone look!

## Integrations 
The mod seamlessly integrates with **Trinkets** and **Curios**, allowing you to equip the smartphone in special slots instead of keeping it in your main inventory.

## Configuration Options

### Feature Toggles
You can enable or disable any of the features in the `config/cobblemon_smartphone.json` config file:

- `enableHeal` - Toggle the healing feature
- `enablePC` - Toggle PC access
- `enableCloud` - Toggle Ender Chest access
- `enablePokedex` - Toggle Pokedex access
- `enablePokenav` - Toggle the Pokenav integration
- `enableWaystone` - Toggle the Waystones integration
- `enableCobbleDollars` - Toggle CobbleDollars shop access

### Cooldown Settings
Customize the cooldown times for each feature to maintain game balance:

- Healing Button: 60 seconds (default)
- PC Access: 5 seconds (default)
- Cloud Storage: 5 seconds (default)
- Waystone Access: 5 seconds (default)
- Pokedex Access: 1 second (default)

## Custom Actions (Datapack/Mod)
Create your action for smartphone: https://rapidmesck.gitbook.io/cobblemon-smartphone
